# Asteri Web Server

Asteri is a high-performance, production-ready Python web server designed for modern developer workflows. It supports WSGI, ASGI, and uWSGI protocols with a unified CLI.

## Core Documentation
- Introduction: /docs/introduction - Overview and mission.
- Installation: /docs/installation - How to install and deploy in production.
- Getting Started: /docs/getting-started - Quick start guide for Flask, FastAPI, and more.
- Worker Types: /docs/workers - Details on sync, gthread, gevent, and asgi workers.
- CLI Reference: /docs/cli-reference - Complete list of command-line arguments.
- Configuration: /docs/configuration - How to use Python-based config files.
- Status Dashboard: /docs/dashboard - Monitoring metrics and health checks.

## Technical Specifications
- Master-Worker process model (Arbiter architecture).
- Support for HTTP/1.1 and HTTP/2.
- Native observability with glassmorphism dashboard.
- Process management: Graceful timeouts, automatic recycling (max-requests), and live-reloading.
- Security: SSL/TLS integration, user/group switching.

## Target Audience
Python developers building web applications, microservices, or APIs who need a reliable and observable runtime environment.
